title: The Wilderness Art Festival is on this weekend, 9 to 12 October!
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The festivities...
bodyText:
Gallery

GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The festivities kicked off last night with a lively launch and dress-up party, setting the tone for a weekend filled with creativity and community spirit.


> Each year, the festival provides a vibrant platform for more than 90 artists from across South Africa to showcase their work.


This year’s theme, ‘Alice in Wonderland’, promises a whimsical and imaginative experience. Entrance is free, and everyone is welcome!

The Night of 1 000 Drawings event raised over R35 000, which was donated to the Seven Passes Initiative (NPO 065-133), a non-profit organisation operating in the rural townships of Touwsranten and Wilderness Heights. The funds contribute to their social and academic development programmes, as well as local feeding schemes.

Step into a world of creativity and escape from reality with an exciting line-up of art, music, workshops and more!


> View the full programme here: wildernessartfestival.co.za


This community-driven event is made possible through the generous support and involvement of Wilderness’ local businesses.

Victoria Charters-Venter having fun at the Wilderness Art Festival.

‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’
